content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Sw-radio.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'']] for radio was produced in 1981 and broadcast by [[National Public Radio]] as part of ''NPR Playhouse''.]]
A list of events in '''1981''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 20|20]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 46|''Star Wars'' (1977) 46]] published.
*[[January 23|23]] – [[Julia Jones]] is born.
*23 – [[Pepe Larraz]] is born.
*[[January 28|28]] – [[Elijah Wood]] is born.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 142|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 142]] published.

==February==
*[[February 9|09]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell]] ''serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[February 17|17]] – [[Joseph Gordon-Levitt]] is born.
*[[February 20|20]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VI Revenge of the Jedi]] first draft is completed.
*[[February 21|21]] – [[Shauna Macdonald]] is born.
*[[February 23|23]] – [[Josh Gad]] is born.
*[[February 24|24]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 47|''Star Wars'' (1977) 47]] published.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 143|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 143]] published.

==March==
*[[March 2|02]] – [[Bryce Dallas Howard]] is born.
*02 – [[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'' (radio)]] premiered: "[[A Wind to Shake the Stars]]" aired.
*[[March 9|09]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[Points of Origin]]" aired.
*[[March 16|16]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[Black Knight, White Princess, and Pawns]]" aired.
*[[March 18|18]] – [[Paul Davis]] is born.
*[[March 24|24]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 48|''Star Wars'' (1977) 48]] published.
*[[March 23|23]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[While Giants Mark Time]]" aired.
*[[March 30|30]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[Jedi that Was, Jedi to Be]]" aired.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 144|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 144]] published.

==April==
[[File:AnakinSkywalker-SWBC52cvr.png|thumb|right|180px|[[Hayden Christensen]] was born on [[April 19]], 1981]]
*[[April 6|06]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[The Han Solo Solution]]" aired.
*[[April 10|10]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] (re-issue)
*[[April 13|13]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[The Millennium Falcon Deal]]" aired.
*[[April 19|19]] – [[Hayden Christensen]] is born.
*[[April 20|20]] – ''[[Darth Vader Strikes]] ''serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*20 – ''Star Wars:'' "[[Death Star's Transit]]" aired.
*[[April 21|21]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' (1977) 49]] published.
*[[April 27|27]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[Rogues, Rebels and Robots]]" aired.

==May==
*[[May 4|04]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[The Luke Skywalker Initiative]]" aired.
*[[May 11|11]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[The Jedi Nexus]]" aired.
*[[May 18|18]] – ''Star Wars:'' "[[The Case for Rebellion]]" aired.
*[[May 19|19]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]] published.
*[[May 25|25]] – ''Star Wars'' (radio) concluded; "[[Force and Counterforce]]" aired.
*[[May 28|28]] – [[Laura Bailey]] is born.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 145|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 145]] published.

==June==
[[File:Padme promo.jpg|thumb|right|180px|[[Natalie Portman]] was born on [[June 9]], 1981]]
*[[June 9|09]] – [[Natalie Portman]] is born.
*[[June 16|16]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' (1977) 51]] published.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 146|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 146]] published.

==July==
[[File:TerrTaneel.jpg|thumb|right|180px|[[Amanda Lucas]] was born on [[July 15]], 1981]]
*[[July 15|15]] – [[Amanda Lucas]] is born.
*[[July 21|21]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 52|''Star Wars'' (1977) 52]] published.
*[[July 27|27]] – ''[[The Serpent Masters]] ''serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[July 31|31]] – [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] (re-issue)
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 147|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 147]] published.

==August==
*[[August 3|03]] – [[Travis Willingham]] is born.
*[[August 18|18]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]] published.
*[[August 21|21]] - [[Eddie Byrne]] dies.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 148|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 148]] published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox's]] IP and licensing rights to ''Star Wars'', excluding ''A New Hope''{{'s}} copyright, revert to [[Lucasfilm]]
*[[September 7|07]] – [[Athena Karkanis]] is born.
*[[September 15|15]] – [[Ben Schwartz]] is born.
*[[September 22|22]] – [[Ashley Eckstein]] is born.
*[[September 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]] published.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 149|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 149]] published.

==October==
*[[October 20|20]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 55|''Star Wars'' (1977) 55]] published.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 150|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 150]] published.

==November==
*[[November 2|02]] – ''[[Deadly Reunion]] ''serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[November 9|09]] – [[Natacha Bustos]] is born.
*[[November 24|24]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' (1977) 56]] published.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 151|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 151]] published.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Russ Manning]] dies.
*[[December 5|05]] – [[Lydia Leonard]] is born.
*[[December 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 57|''Star Wars'' (1977) 57]] published.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 152|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 152]] published.

==Unknown==
*[[Alex Wyndham]] is born.

==Miscellaneous==
*[[Kenner Products|Kenner]] releases the following action figures:
**[[Vehicle Command Crewer|AT-AT Driver]]
**[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] Outfit
**[[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]]
**[[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]]
**[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] Commander
**[[2-1B/Legends|2-1B]]
**[[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]]
**[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]
**[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] Outfit
**[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Commander

----

{{Years-RealWorld}}

|pt=1981
}}
